full_text:
Liu Dun (Ziren)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Dun, styledZiren, was born in Pingyuan. Used his magic to find rebels and bandits for Sun Fu, predicted Sun Yi’s death. Liu Dun was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
